message: Node started: Perform a deep-dive technical synthesis of the relationship between Quantum Darwinism (QD) and Holographic Quantum Error Correction (HQEC). Your analysis must map the following three correspondences: 1) The correspondence between 'Redundancy via Environmental Fragmentation' in QD and 'Subsystem Encoding/Logical-to-Physical Mapping' in HQEC; 2) The correspondence between 'Pointer States' in QD and 'Code Subspaces/Protected Logical States' in HQEC; and 3) The correspondence between 'Information Accessibility via Fragmented Observers' in QD and 'Bulk Reconstruction via Boundary Subregions' in HQEC. For each, categorize the relationship as 'Formally Proven' (e.g., via the Ryu-Takayanagi/Subregion-Duality link), 'Established Literature/Analogy' (e.g., the role of entanglement entropy), or 'Theoretical Conjecture' (e.g., the dynamical emergence of the bulk from decoherence). Finally, identify the 'Gap': the lack of a formal mathematical bridge that derives the holographic bulk geometry directly from the decoherence-induced redundancy of QD.
